textByHash.26dfdde0731e56b8fb04f88e35ef0f89dc78c612: Hey, food sack, what's the rush? I was talking to you!
textByHash.2f0ee1ef318dd33d1277ee73d136502172d00702: Well clear off! These are Lord Jovkai's personal tithes.
textByHash.3f6ea279851e402934644f135b2029b32f5d37df: Get about your business, meat sack, before I perforate you real good!
textByHash.4ca2a87bc49cb97d0ac5616cea6fe78b6936543b: Hmm, you look like a tasty specimen - in fact I'm quite peckish right now. You can either go to the mines or give me a bite; what do you say?
textByHash.6c3e51bb3059d50e1ca0c0150c735a21cd4d07f8: Hey you! What are you doing?
textByHash.737914087ca28c94ac0fd816eea318570812ba50: You want to go to the mines? Well that's a new one. You asked for it though...
textByHash.7c02a926642eec2e5b2caee53b7f2b18c17892c4: Why are you still here? Go tell Lasiurus that his slaves will be with him soon.
textByHash.8b2c9fcfd1625c9030e29cc1b599e389745230ca: Impressive. Not many of you have the spine for it these days!
textByHash.8c040006dbff16bd534ea2e669d923bb0c1bf337: It's this vyre, my lord. They're here to cause trouble.
textByHash.9831a12994cbcd87ae5387f89959b2c2e9e9b028: Ooh, a meat sack... I could just do with a snack. What's it to be: some time in the mines or do I get a bite?
textByHash.a3d054527bd589b6c8eb9147a498a8bc30800eea: Go about your business, meat sack, before I perforate you real good!
textByHash.b74a1c1d8899fc46c2b76e02b02e25b9d8713142: Slurp! You look positively delicious - let me help you lose a bit of weight! Either I get a bite or you can be my combat practice; which is it to be, meat sack?
textByHash.c403bab470f56a697c7f3788a00050420c47d72d: Ooh, a meat sack... I could just do with a snack. What's it to be: do I use you for combat practice or do I get a bite?
textByHash.c9209b3b573b8d8b8a7f9b029bd8a1ad506e522d: Ha! I'm not falling for that! Prepare to be tithed...
textByHash.c92556c5384dab63e99b314746db617bf3fab64c: Hmm, you look like a tasty specimen - in fact I'm quite peckish right now. You can either give me a bite or I'll use you for combat practice; what do you say?
textByHash.cac5a656ec046b02690497d1310d98d4932b2136: Get out of my face, meat sack, I don't 'play' with my food.
textByHash.d0d2eab3193d39c16d4095515999a95713f58fa4: Get away from there food sack.
textByHash.d84b26b2b1c7e706d6de2ebda1b7feeb17c96c59: Slurp! You look positively delicious - let me help you lose a bit of weight! Either I get a bite or you can go to the mines; which is it to be, meat sack?
textByHash.e536bd8f8dc31a1d791e2521153ac2fa79e9b078: Yes. I can provide you with a teleport there.
textByHash.e5d79268df1b9d46eab4332cef1e33409d8fe93a: I want a word with you!
textByHash.f009692a701dde9048c26d4da552ebcf061a4950: Leave me alone. I have a job to do.
textByHash.fc06953a4a14d71e36792dac7d1c27fbd7cfd544: Watch yourself out here. These humans are nasty pieces of work.
textByHash.fefd692b90439d8a33ec7f1c38b5222c81be30ac: Impressive. Not many of you have the spine for it, these days!
